name: Fresh Red Dragon Fruit
description: Hand-picked, premium red dragon fruit directly from our Rafah orchards. Rich in antioxidants and vibrant in flavor.

name: Artisanal Dragon Fruit Jam
description: Small-batch jam made with 100% natural dragon fruit and a hint of organic lemon. No artificial preservatives.

name: Organic Dragon Fruit Powder
description: Freeze-dried pink dragon fruit powder. Perfect for smoothies, lattes, and natural food coloring.

name: Dragon Fruit & Rose Syrup
description: A premium botanical blend of dragon fruit and rose petals. Perfect for mocktails and desserts.

name: Yellow Dragon Fruit (XL)
description: Rare yellow dragon fruit with exceptionally sweet white flesh. The connoisseur's choice.

name: Dried Dragon Fruit Chips
description: Crunchy, healthy, and naturally sweet. Made from 100% dragon fruit without added sugar.

name: Dragon Fruit Orchard Honey
description: Limited edition honey harvested from bees that pollinate our dragon fruit flowers. Subtle floral notes.
